provider.name: yahoo_chart
provider.stability_note: Yahoo's chart endpoint is unofficial and has no API SLA. One-attempt collection and immutable exact-byte raw response caches are mandatory.
provider.use_restriction: Yahoo chart data is permitted here only for the owner's personal, non-commercial use. The repository and R2 bucket must remain private and cached responses or derived Yahoo data must not be redistributed.
